This market refers to the tennis match between Simone Massellani and Yannik Alvarez in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 24 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 23. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.

events.title: Australian Open Men's: Simone Massellani vs Yannik Alvarez
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Simone Massellani and Yannik Alvarez in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 23 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Massellani' if Simone Massellani advances against Yannik Alvarez.

This market will resolve to 'Alvarez' if Yannik Alvarez advances against Simone Massellani.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Daniel Tazabekov and Flynn Thomas in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 24 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 11. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam results.

This market refers on the tennis match between Anastasia Lizunova and Riyo Yoshida in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 23 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Lizunova' if Anastasia Lizunova advances against Riyo Yoshida.

This market will resolve to 'Yoshida' if Riyo Yoshida advances against Anastasia Lizunova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Lizunova vs. Yoshida: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Anastasia Lizunova and Riyo Yoshida in the Australian Open Juniors, Girls, scheduled for January 24 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.

This market refers to the tennis match between Odysseas Geladaris and Kai Thompson in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 24 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 9. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."

If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam results.

question: Game Handicap: WE (-2.5) vs LGD NBW (+2.5)
description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between LGD NBW and Team WE in the King Pro League Stage 1 Group 2, scheduled for January 23 at 1:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE wins 3 or more games than LGD NBW in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "LGD NBW".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
